nasb.text: And He came to Nazareth, where He had been brought up; and as was His custom, He entered the synagogue on the Sabbath, and stood up to read.

esv.text: And he came to Nazareth, where he had been brought up. And as was his custom, he went to the synagogue on the Sabbath day, and he stood up to read.

cnv.text: 耶穌來到拿撒勒自己長大的地方，照著習慣在安息日進入會堂，站起來要讀經。

ccb.text: 祂来到自己长大的地方拿撒勒，照常在安息日进会堂，并站起来诵读圣经。

csbs.text: 耶稣来到拿撒勒，就是他长大的地方。在安息日那天，他照自己的习惯进了会堂，站起来要诵读经文。
